subcodes.first_line: O People! O People! The Sun of Reality has dawned from the horizon of the world... The teachings of His Holiness Bahá'u'lláh declare the oneness of the human world...
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @spiritual transformation, @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @equality of men and women, @The Holy Spirit, @universal language, @race unity; racial issues, @living waters; water of life, @harmony of science and religion, @universal education
